title: Review summary for rule_fxd_ndf_primary_rate_source
summary: Local demo signoff accepted for Java service testing. Open questions are not production truth.

open_questions.question: Confirm exact target child suffixes for quotedCurrencyPair, primaryRateSource, secondaryRateSource, and fixingTime.
open_questions.current_assumption: Standard Stella/FpML-like child names were generated from visible block names and rule summaries.

open_questions.question: Confirm whether source fixingTime/hourMinuteTime text is intentionally used as `cutoff_code`/LOCODE.
open_questions.current_assumption: The photographed lookup and rules bind this source field as `cutoff_code`.

open_questions.question: Confirm whether secondaryRateSource/rateSourcePage should bind the cutoff description field exactly.
open_questions.current_assumption: Photo and evidence text indicate `cutoff_description` is used.

review_conclusions.conclusion: Accepted as local demo signoff material for RTS Java service testing.
review_conclusions.production_gate: Recheck source-photo reconstruction, target XPath suffixes, cutoff_code semantics, and secondary rate source page binding before production signoff.

warnings: OCR was performed from photographed monitor images; some long target XPaths were truncated and reconstructed by convention.
Source and target element casing was normalized to visible FpML/SCBML conventions.
Workbook spelling includes `PRIMARY_SOUCE_*`; this draft preserves visible column spelling in lookup return fields.
The photographed pack is accepted for local demo signoff, but source-photo reconstruction should be rechecked before production signoff.
